title: Wandering Spoils
description: Wandering Traders now drop their stock on death
body:
Wandering Spoils

---

Features

- **Drops trader stock:** When a Wandering Trader dies, they have a configurable chance to drop items from their trade inventory *(their “stock”, should work properly with modded entries)* - **Per-item drop chance:** Each trade offer item rolls its own drop chance, giving dynamic and varied loot - **Emerald bonuses:** There's also a chance to drop emeralds to simulate wandering trader "wallet" *(amount doesn’t change with trades to prevent easy farming)* ---

How to enable?

Use gamerule to enable or disable the mechanic. By default it's true ```bash /gamerule doWanderingTraderDrops true|false ``` ---

Configuration

| Option | Description | |:--|:--| | **Drop chances** | Set individual percentage chances for stock items and emeralds | | **Item blacklist** | Prevent specific items from ever dropping | | **Drop amounts** | Choose min/max quantities, can also do fullstack drops | | **Scatter power** | Adjust item scatter intensity, set to **2** for piñata mode | | **Creative override** | Allow creative-mode kills to drop everything | ---
